common.name: Name
common.emptyBody: There are no records for the current filters.
common.errorBody: The console could not load this data.
common.safeErrorBody: The action did not finish. Check permissions, connectivity and backend logs.
common.unsupportedAction: This action is not available in the current backend capability set.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use the control-plane account issued by an administrator.
auth.inviteSubtitle: Set the operator password from a one-time invitation.
auth.apiSettingsHint: Leave empty to use the same origin as the browser page.

dashboard.title: Operational overview
dashboard.subtitle: Control-plane readiness, fleet health, service state and active work.

nodes.title: Managed nodes
nodes.subtitle: Agent status, node role, heartbeat, runtime capability and trust lifecycle.
nodes.mapSubtitle: Node placement, GeoIP readiness and backhaul topology.

instances.title: Service instances
instances.subtitle: Runtime objects deployed on managed nodes. Client access groups are managed under Clients -> Groups.
instances.accessGroupsReadOnly: Access groups are shown as runtime materialization context only.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Client identities, access bindings, generated delivery artifacts and subscriptions.
clients.groupsSubtitle: Source of truth for VLESS and future grouped access materialization.
clients.selectionInvalidatesPreview: Changing selection invalidates the previous preview.
clients.bulkBounded: Bulk operations are bounded by affected instances, not one apply job per client.

firewall.title: Firewall
firewall.subtitle: Address groups -> rules -> policy -> preview -> apply -> node state.
firewall.previewMandatory: Preview is mandatory before strict apply.

traffic.title: Traffic accounting
traffic.subtitle: Overview, client usage, collectors, samples and no-store export.
traffic.noStoreExport: Export is requested directly from the backend and must not be cached.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Active work, history, failures and backend execution logs.
jobs.cancelConfirmBody: Cancel job {{id}} ({{type}}). The backend will reject cancellation if the job is already terminal or cannot be interrupted safely.
jobs.cancelUnavailable: Only queued, pending, retrying or running jobs can be cancelled.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime preflight, TLS, auth, mail, security and local browser settings.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.subtitle: TLS certificates, managed authorities and service PKI roots.

backhaul.title: Backhaul
backhaul.subtitle: Ingress-to-egress links, standby transports, route projection and repair actions.

artifacts.title: Artifacts / Delivery
artifacts.subtitle: Generated client configurations, downloads, public share links and delivery state.

errors.forbidden: The current operator does not have permission for this action.
errors.conflict: The backend reported a conflict. Refresh the page and review the current state.
errors.validation: The backend rejected the request. Review highlighted fields.
errors.server: The backend returned an internal error.
